variables.description: The main domain name for your Prosody server (e.g., example.com)
variables.label: Domain Name

variables.description: The JID for the Admin User.
variables.label: Admin Username

variables.description: The password for the administrator account. This will be securely stored in the configuration.
variables.label: Admin Password

variables.description: The subdomain used for group chats. This value needs to be added as an A or CNAME record for your domain.
variables.label: MUC Subdomain

variables.description: The subdomain used for file sharing. This value needs to be added as an A or CNAME record for your domain.
variables.label: Upload Subdomain
